def negative_test_depends_on_sibling_test_side_effects():
    rule_id = "test_depends_on_sibling_test_side_effects"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Test function depends on state left behind by a sibling test in the same module."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
